required_environmental_variable.GEMINI_AUTH_MODE: if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a && source ./.env && set +a; fi; printf %s "${GEMINI_AUTH_MODE:-cli}"

required_environmental_variable.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a && source ./.env && set +a; fi; if [ -n "${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}" ]; then printf %s "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"; else echo "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required for claude-code API authentication." >&2; exit 1; fi

required_environmental_variable.OPENROUTER_API: if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a && source ./.env && set +a; fi; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_API:-}" ]; then printf %s "$OPENROUTER_API"; else echo "OPENROUTER_API is required for opencode OpenRouter authentication." >&2; exit 1; fi
